known_before_lock.prospective_scope: derived-outcome mechanism test; not wholly untouched dataset confirmation

allowed_inputs: committed C69-C71 manifests, physical-view contracts, and frozen source-side artifacts

T3_HO: no tuning from T3-HO intervention outcomes
data_roles.same_label_oracle: opened only after all H1-H6 primary T3-HO outcomes are frozen

primary_hypotheses.H1: a target-common utility offset leaves every within-target candidate ranking exactly invariant
primary_hypotheses.H2: an all-class common logit scalar leaves probabilities and downstream metrics invariant within numerical tolerance
primary_hypotheses.H3: T2-calibrated shared target-level class-vector and temperature interventions are insufficient to reproduce candidate-specific T3-HO held-out ordering
primary_hypotheses.H4: candidate-specific perturbation rank-flip probability increases with perturbation-gap divided by original pair margin
primary_hypotheses.H5: construction-estimated candidate-specific gauge closes only part of the T3-HO measurement-control gap
primary_hypotheses.H6: conditional on measurement reliability, top-1 degrades with larger candidate fields, smaller top-two margins, and larger residual gauge scale

primary_decomposition.order_sensitivity: all 24 component orders; report Shapley mean and min/max ordered attribution
primary_decomposition.normalization: fraction of observed top1 gap from oracle top1=1 to no-intervention top1, clipped only for display; raw signed values retained

utility_registry.bAcc: macro mean class recall; higher is better
utility_registry.NLL: mean negative log probability of true class; lower is better
utility_registry.ECE: 15 fixed equal-width confidence bins; lower is better
utility_registry.joint_utility: equal-weight mean of within-target midrank percentiles for bAcc, -NLL, and -ECE
utility_registry.continuous_utility_cone: nonnegative weights on within-target midrank percentiles of bAcc, -NLL, -ECE; simplex step 0.10
utility_registry.primary_joint_good: candidate lies in the top quartile on all three oriented endpoint midranks

topk_registry.tie_rule: fractional credit across all candidates tied at the selection or oracle boundary

margin_registry.top_two: best held-out utility minus second-best held-out utility
margin_registry.best_k: best held-out utility minus kth-best for k in {3,5,ceil(0.10*M)}
margin_registry.top_quartile: distance from candidate utility to within-field 75th percentile
margin_registry.source_rank: absolute difference of joined frozen source-visible rank score; unavailable rows are reason-coded
margin_registry.construction: absolute difference of split-label construction score

I3.name: shared_target_class_vector
I3.vector_templates: centered one-vs-rest vectors for every class plus T2 construction class-frequency residual vector
I3.T2_selection: maximize mean held-out pairwise ordering accuracy; ties choose smaller L2 magnitude then lexicographic template
I3.T3_HO_rule: apply one locked template/magnitude per intervention family; no T3-HO tuning

I4.name: shared_target_temperature
I4.T2_selection: maximize mean held-out joint-utility ordering accuracy; ties choose temperature closest to 1

I5.name: candidate_specific_perturbation
I5.T2_selection: select scale/alpha by mean held-out pairwise ordering accuracy; ties choose smaller scale/alpha
I5.T3_HO_rule: apply locked scale/alpha; evaluation labels never fit perturbations

I6.name: same_label_oracle
I6.fit: candidate-specific class-vector bias selected on evaluation labels from the I3 magnitude/template grid

I7.name: representation_projection
I7.run_if: validated representation or Wdotz fields exist in both caches

finite_population_best_arm_plan.disagreement_probability: finite-population fraction of nonzero paired contrasts
finite_population_best_arm_plan.sampling: without replacement from the registered construction pool
finite_population_best_arm_plan.pair_bound: empirical Bernstein-Serfling bound with explicit finite-population correction
finite_population_best_arm_plan.top1_extension: Bonferroni union bound over best-versus-other candidate pairs
finite_population_best_arm_plan.topk_extension: union bound over best-versus-candidates outside oracle top-k
finite_population_best_arm_plan.assumption_reporting: bound/proxy unless every stated condition is checked; no theorem wording for unchecked assumptions

multiplicity.bandwidth_secondary: fixed bandwidth grid with nested max-stat null if used

failure_gates: T2 tuning leaks T3-HO intervention outcomes
T3-HO intervention family selected after T3-HO outcome access
evaluation labels fit any I0-I5 intervention
same-label oracle opened before primary freeze
utility-common offset conflated with class-vector logit shift
representation claim without representation or Wdotz fields
top1 reported without random 1/M base rate
new forward, re-inference, training, GPU, BNCI2014_004, or seeds 3/4
selector, checkpoint recommendation, selected checkpoint ID, deployability, source-only rescue, target-population, EEG minimax, or manuscript claim
